hero.heading: Your AI SAT Study Partner
hero.subheading: Your personalized SAT preparation assistant that adapts to your learning style — master Math and Reading/Writing, all in one place.
hero.feature1: Adaptive practice tests that match your skill level
hero.feature2: AI coach that guides you without giving away answers
hero.feature3: Track your progress and crush your SAT goals
hero.social_proof: Join thousands of students preparing smarter with AI

features.heading: Everything you need to ace the SAT
features.subheading: Powerful features designed to personalize your study experience and maximize your score improvement.
features.adaptive_desc: Our AI analyzes your performance and adjusts difficulty in real-time to maximize learning efficiency.
features.style_desc: Take a quick quiz to discover if you're a visual, auditory, reading/writing, or kinesthetic learner.
features.progress_desc: Visualize your strengths and weaknesses with detailed analytics and personalized recommendations.
features.flexible_desc: Practice with 10, 25, 50, 75, or full 154-question tests — fit studying into any schedule.
features.coach_desc: Get hints and explanations without spoilers — our AI guides you to the answer, never gives it away.
features.flashcards_desc: Generate flashcards automatically from your study materials or let AI create them from any topic.
features.coverage_desc: Complete Math and Reading/Writing practice with official-style questions and detailed feedback.
features.timed_desc: Toggle timer on or off — build test-taking stamina or focus on understanding without pressure.

pricing.heading: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subheading: Choose the plan that fits your needs. Upgrade or downgrade anytime.
pricing.free_trial: Start with our free plan, or try Pro features free for 7 days!
